author: i-am-rudi
description: Track your workouts, exercises, and fitness progress. Create repeatable workout templates, structure in workout plans and log in an interactive sessions. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: I-am-Rudi
manifest.description: Track your workouts, exercises, and fitness progress. Create repeatable workout templates, structure in workout plans and log in an interactive sessions.
manifest.name: Workout Journal

name: Workout Journal

releases.author: I-am-Rudi
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Edit overhaul by @I-am-Rudi in https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/workout-journal/pull/61


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/workout-journal/compare/0.1.27...0.1.28

Edit current note as workout plan — opens PlanBuilderModal pre-filled from the active note
Add example exercise and routine notes — creates 5 example exercises + 1 Push Day routine
ExerciseSettingsPage and RoutineSettingsPage now load from vault notes, not legacy settings
RoutineSettingsPage Add routine button now calls plugin.createRoutineNoteFromPrompt() directly (no more legacy modal)
Library section shows Exercises / Routines (note-based) instead of legacy template counts
Migration section replaced with Add example templates button

releases.description:

* Bug fix and feature extension by @I-am-Rudi in https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/workout-journal/pull/56

## New Contributors
* @I-am-Rudi made their first contribution in https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/workout-journal/pull/56

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/workout-journal/compare/0.1.22...0.1.23

Drag and drop
cardio exercises need to be shown as cardio
special type sets need to be shown in the next session as the type and are not counted in personal records
Pause timer continues on lock

releases.author: I-am-Rudi
releases.description:

releases.author: I-am-Rudi
releases.description:

* Stabilize active-session Save/Cancel controls and enforce vertical-only scrolling by @Copilot in https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/workout-journal/pull/51
* Preserve active session scroll position across workout view rerenders by @Copilot in https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/workout-journal/pull/52
* Route ribbon Quick Log to active session with an empty “untitled” routine by @Copilot in https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/workout-journal/pull/53


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/workout-journal/compare/0.1.20...0.1.21

releases.author: I-am-Rudi

releases.author: I-am-Rudi

releases.author: I-am-Rudi
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Resolve static-analysis findings in plan builder callbacks and import error handling by @Copilot in https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/workout-journal/pull/43
* Align routine note textarea background with routine note banner by @Copilot in https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/workout-journal/pull/44
* Add optional haptic/sound feedback for set checkboxes and rest timer completion by @Copilot in https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/workout-journal/pull/45
* Remove visible border from routine notes input in workout session cards by @Copilot in https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/workout-journal/pull/46


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/workout-journal/compare/0.1.5...0.1.6

* Rename Obsidian plugin ID to `workout-journal` by @Copilot in https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/workout-journal/pull/33

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/workout-journal/compare/v0.0.24...0.0.25

releases.author: I-am-Rudi
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Equal spacing between exercise name, timer, and arrow controls by @Copilot in https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/obsidian-workout-journal/pull/27
* fix: folder/path settings changes not reflected until plugin reload by @Copilot in https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/obsidian-workout-journal/pull/28
* Add confirmation dialog before cancelling an active workout session by @Copilot in https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/obsidian-workout-journal/pull/29
* feat: prefix all plugin-managed frontmatter keys with `wj-` by @Copilot in https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/obsidian-workout-journal/pull/30


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/I-am-Rudi/obsidian-workout-journal/compare/v0.0.22...v0.0.23
